footer.tagline: Capture enquiries. Track admissions. One place.

hero.label: For coaching institutes
hero.headline: Stop losing enquiries, cut follow-up chaos
hero.subtext: Handle calls, WhatsApp chats, and follow-ups daily without confusion.
hero.trustLine: Trusted by 500+ institutes | 2,50,000+ enquiries handled monthly

enquiry.label: Enquiry
enquiry.description: Capture calls, QR scans, and website forms.

followUp.label: Follow-up
followUp.description: See who to call and message today.

admission.label: Admission
admission.description: Move confirmed enquiries into active admissions.

student.label: Student
student.description: Keep records, fees, and batch status updated.

problem.title: Your admissions are scattered everywhere.
problem.item1: Enquiries vanish in WhatsApp. You forget who to follow up with.
problem.item2: During busy seasons, follow-ups slip through the cracks.
problem.item3: Student info is in spreadsheets, notebooks, and your head.
problem.item4: You never know who paid what or how much they owe.
problem.item5: No way to see if your team is keeping up with admissions.

solution.title: Everything in one place. Nothing gets lost.
solution.item1: Capture enquiries from your website, QR codes, or shared links.
solution.item2: Never forget a follow-up—the system reminds you and your team.
solution.item3: See every student, course, and batch in one view.
solution.item4: Track what each student owes. Record every payment.
solution.item5: Students can check their courses and updates on their own.

featuresSection.title: What you get
featuresSection.item1Description: Capture every call, message, or form submission. See what to do next.
featuresSection.item2Description: Your school appears online. Students see your courses. Enquiries come straight to you.
featuresSection.item3Description: No digging through files. See every student's course, batch, and status.
featuresSection.item4Description: Track dues, installments, and payments. No more guessing.
featuresSection.item5Description: Everyone sees the same enquiries and students. No missed handoffs.
featuresSection.item6Description: Get WhatsApp or email alerts for new enquiries and follow-ups.

useCasesSection.title: Used by coaching institutes like yours
useCasesSection.item1Description: Handle rush season without losing enquiries. Know which students to follow up with.
useCasesSection.item2Description: Keep up with daily enquiries and fees without Excel headaches.
useCasesSection.item3Description: Track who's enrolled, what they're paying, and if they're keeping up.
useCasesSection.item4Description: Juggle multiple batches and track every student without losing track.

trust.title: Built by people who run coaching institutes.
trust.subtitle: We get the chaos. That's why we built this.
trust.item1: Already used by coaching institutes in Pune and beyond
trust.item2: Your data stays yours. We never sell it or share it.
trust.item3: Secure payments via Razorpay. No hidden charges.
trust.item4: Cancel anytime. No lock-in. No surprise fees.

howItWorks.title: The process
howItWorks.step3: You follow up. The system reminds you.
howItWorks.step4: Student joins. Track their fees and progress.

demo.title: Every institute gets its own page
demo.description: Students see your courses. They send enquiries. Everything lands in your dashboard.

pricing.title: Unlimited Students. Unlimited Enquiries. No Hidden Commissions.
pricing.description: Choose by team size. Keep all core features from day one.
pricing.positioningLine: No feature lock. No usage caps. Full support included.

header.headline: Unlimited Students. Unlimited Enquiries. No Hidden Commissions.
header.subtext: We grow as you grow. Choose a plan based on your team size and communication needs.
header.trustLine: No feature lock, no usage caps, full support included from day one.

capabilities.item1: Capture enquiries from website forms, QR codes, and shared links

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Keep admissions work clear and on time with a focused team.
starter.whenToUseLine1: Best when the owner and one team member handle daily enquiries.
starter.whenToUseLine2: Good for keeping follow-ups, fees, and student records in one place.
starter.whenToUseLine3: A practical starting point with predictable monthly cost.

team.name: Team
team.description: Help a small admissions team work together without confusion.
team.whenToUseLine1: Best when counsellors and admin both work on admissions.
team.whenToUseLine2: Useful when your team needs shared visibility on every enquiry.
team.whenToUseLine3: Works smoothly as daily enquiry volume keeps increasing.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: Run admissions and student operations smoothly as teams expand.
growth.whenToUseLine1: Best when multiple staff members manage follow-ups every day.
growth.whenToUseLine2: Good for institutes handling larger batches and active fee tracking.
growth.whenToUseLine3: Built for steady growth without changing how your team works.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: Keep large teams aligned across admissions and student operations.
scale.whenToUseLine1: Best for multi-branch institutes with bigger operations teams.
scale.whenToUseLine2: Useful when many team members need clear ownership and updates.
scale.whenToUseLine3: Designed for institutes that need consistent workflows at scale.

comparisonTable.title: Compare plans quickly
comparisonTable.subtext: Core capabilities stay the same. Team size is what changes.

pricing.faq1Answer: Yes. Upgrade anytime from your settings. You'll only pay the difference.
pricing.faq2Question: What if I reach my user limit?
pricing.faq2Answer: Upgrade to the next plan. Everything keeps working while you add users.
pricing.faq3Answer: Yes. Full access. No credit card. No sales calls. Try everything.
pricing.faq4Answer: We send you alerts about new enquiries and follow-ups. Optional: Connect your own WhatsApp Business account to message students. Meta bills you directly.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.q1: Is there really a free trial?
faq.a1: Yes. 14 days. Full access. No card needed.
faq.a2: Yes. Anytime. No questions asked. Your data stays yours.
faq.a3: Yes. Razorpay handles all payments. Your data is encrypted.
faq.a4: Yes. Each institute has its own private workspace. We never sell or share your data.
faq.q5: Can my team use it together?
faq.a5: Yes. Team plans let multiple people access the same workspace. Each person has their own login.
faq.a6: You track fees and payments inside Classes360. Connect Razorpay to accept payments directly.
